sections.title: Talking to General Wartface or General Bentnoze

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: All goblins should wear red armour!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Not red! Red armour make you look fat.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Everything make YOU look fat!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Fatty!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: SHUT UP!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Even this human think you look fat! Don't you, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, he looks fat!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Ha ha! See, fatty? Even human think you fat!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Me not care what human think! Human ugly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you arguing about the colour of your armour?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: We decide to celebrate goblin new century by changing colour of our armour. Brown get boring after a bit. We want change.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Problem is, we can't agree on new colour. We think maybe we use old goblin tribe colours, but Bentnoze from rubbish Thorobshuun tribe and me from much better Garagorshuun tribe.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Thorobshuun tribe colour is red! Way better than silly green of Garagorshuun tribe.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the goblin new century?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Goblin century mark year of battle on Plain of Mud. That when Big High War God give goblin commandments.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Big High War God?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Big High War God is god for goblins. He take us and make us strong, not stupid like humans.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Me bet Big High War God would pick red armour.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up! Big High War God would hate you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wouldn't you prefer peace?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Goblins not so good at peace. Maybe peace be okay though, as long as it peace wearing green armour.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: But green too much like skin. Nearly make you look naked!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you want me to pick an armour colour for you?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Yes, as long as you pick green.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: No you have to pick red!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You should wear red.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: See? Even stupid human think red best. Now we all wear red!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Human not know anything! If we wear red then whole village be ugly like YOU!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Go away human. You not helping.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You should wear green.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Green! We all wear green now, human has decided!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Why we have to do what human say? He not boss of us!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: No but he agree with me!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: That prove you a filthy human-lover!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Me hate humans! This human just happen to be right!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Go away human. You not know anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about a different colour?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: That would mean me wrong... but at least Wartface not right!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Well Bentnoze never been right in his life. Still, maybe new colour good, but will have to see armour before decide.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Human! You bring us armour in new colour!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can do that.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: What colour we try?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Orange armour might be good.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Yep, bring us orange armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How am I meant to get orange armour?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Well first you get goblin armour...

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: ...and then you dye it orange!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Even human should be able to work that out!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get goblin armour?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: There some spare armour around village somewhere. You can take that.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: It in crates somewhere. Can't remember which crates now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get dye?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: You go north of here into wilderness. There you find many ways to die!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, D-Y-E, not D-I-E.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Stupid Bentnoze, you not know how to spell!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Shut up Wartface!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where I can get dye?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Me not know where dye come from.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well where did you get your red and green dye from?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Some goblin or other, he steal it. Say he steal it from old witch in Draynor Village.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Maybe you can get more dye from her?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll be back soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I think I'll leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, he doesn't look fat.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Shut up human! Wartface fat and human stupid!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up Bentnoze!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: I tell all goblins in village to wear green armour now!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: They not listen to you! I already tell them wear red armour!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: They listen to me not you! They know me bigger general!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Me bigger general! They listen to me!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Human! What colour armour they wearing out there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Half of them are wearing red and half of them green.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up human! They wearing green armour really! Human lying because he scared of you!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Human scared of me not you? Then you think me bigger general!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: What? Me mean...

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up! Me bigger general!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: We should wear green armour!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Green armour? Are you stupid?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: You stupid! Only stupid goblins think red armour better!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: No they don't! Me think red armour better!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: That because you stupid!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Me not stupid!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Then why you not like green armour?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Because red armour better!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Only stupid goblins think that! You stupid!

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Green armour best.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: No no red every time.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Go away human, we busy.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Red armour best.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: No it has to be green!

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Go away human, we busy.

sections.title: Showing the Generals different goblin armours

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think of this colour?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: That wrong colour.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: We tell you get orange armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some orange armour here.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: Yes General Wartface?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Put on this armour!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: What do you think?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: No I don't like that much.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: It clashes with skin colour.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: We need darker colour, like blue.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Yeah blue might be good.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Human! Get us blue armour!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: Me not like this blue colour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: Me not know. It just make me feel...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Makes you feel blue?

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: Makes me feel kind of sad.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Shut up Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think of this colour?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: That wrong colour.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: We tell you get blue armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some blue armour here.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: Yes General Wartface?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Put on this armour!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: What do you think?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: That not right. Not goblin colour at all.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Goblins wear dark earthy colours like brown.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: Yeah brown might be good.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Human! Get us brown armour!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I thought brown was the armour you were changing from...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind, anything is worth a try.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think of this colour?

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: That wrong colour.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: We tell you get brown armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some brown armour here.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Grubfoot!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: Yes General Wartface?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Put on this armour!

lines.speaker: Grubfoot
lines.text: What do you think?

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: That colour quite nice. Me can see myself wearing that.

lines.speaker: General Bentnoze
lines.text: It a deal then. Brown armour it is.

lines.speaker: General Wartface
lines.text: Thank you for sorting out argument, human. You have reward now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks... I think...
